app.name: Altimate Code
app.one_liner: An open-source agentic data engineering CLI that provides AI-powered SQL analysis, column-level lineage, and integrations with dbt and major cloud warehouses.

screens.name: Terminal User Interface (TUI)
screens.purpose: Primary interaction surface for configuring LLMs, discovering data stacks, and executing agentic data engineering tasks.
primary_actions: /connect — configure LLM provider and API key
/discover — auto-detect dbt projects and warehouse connections

rust_commands.name: connect
rust_commands.purpose: Interactively configure LLM provider and authenticate with API key.

rust_commands.name: discover
rust_commands.purpose: Auto-detect dbt projects, warehouse connections from ~/.dbt/profiles.yml, Docker, or environment variables in a read-only manner.

rust_commands.name: traces
rust_commands.purpose: Display trace history dialog for debugging agent interactions.

mvp_plan: week 1: Add support for Anthropic and OpenAI API key configuration
week 1: Build schema caching with better-sqlite3 (addressing Bun compatibility)
week 1: Implement core TUI with /connect and /discover commands
week 1: Integrate read-only warehouse connection detection from standard sources
acceptance_tests: Application runs on Linux systems without GLIBC_2.35 or native binding errors.
Application starts in TUI mode and displays streaming responses without corrupted output from SDK logs.
Installation via npm includes all required components (dbt-tools, altimate-setup) without missing bundles.
Running 'altimate /discover' correctly detects dbt projects from ~/.dbt/profiles.yml without write access.
User can run 'altimate /connect' and successfully configure an LLM provider via interactive prompt.
